description:
Deferred items from the 2026-07-04 site-audit roadmap execution (Phases 0-5, all shipped same day). None urgent.

1. **Fitting implants/boosters** — deferred from fit comparison (b062565); compare view + tool note both say 'implants not modeled'.
2. **Industry P&L** — Trading P&L (fad4d82) ships FIFO trade matching only; manufacture-cost linkage (build cost -> sale) is a separate engine.
3. **Invention/decryptor math** — Build Finder (c42c255) ranks manufacturing margin only; no T2 invention expected-cost math.
4. **Net-worth escrow + industry WIP** — orders_json/industry_json cache columns are vestigial (never written); wiring order escrow + job value into snapshots needs a new sync field each (wallet_transactions sync from fad4d82 is the pattern to copy).
5. **Star map ?focus auto-pan** — palette + entity_links link k-space systems to /map?focus={id}; the React StarMap has focusSystem(id) + a URL-param useEffect but needs a small frontend wire-up + npm run build.
6. **Nav crowding 768-1120px** — 8 top-level groups don't wrap (.b-nav-links is nowrap); hamburger only kicks in at 768px. Consider flex-wrap or a lower breakpoint.
7. **Killfeed route-leg labeling** — GateRoutePlannerPanel doesn't label which leg is the Thera/Turnur hole; evescout.parse_connections now returns `via` so it's cheap.
8. **Entity-stats composite indexes** — prod EXPLAIN showed ix_km_victim_corp_time / ix_kma_corp_time already cover the shapes (0.00s); revisit only if character/alliance kinds prove slower (they use different columns — spot-check EXPLAIN if a page feels slow).
9. **Deferred from earlier**: killfeed visible-row cap (memory note, schedule after Feature B).
title: Site-audit roadmap follow-ups (implants, industry P&L, invention, escrow, map focus)
